TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Aaron_Brooks, title = Aaron_Brooks, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Aaron_Brooks} }

S.FORM: == nilacul == siwkay niza ci Aaron Brooks nalecuhan i 1 a bulad 14 a demiad 1985 a mihcaan. u miunduay ciniza. u Amilika biluwa'-mali a kawaw-mimaliay, ayzasa sikawaw i NBA Indian Liuma team. u takalaw niza sa 183cm. u sulit nu Hulam kalunasulitan-sulu
S.PHON: == nir~…æa ¶ur~…æ == siwkaj niza ¶i aaron brooks nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i * a bur~…æad ** a d…ômiad **** a miƒß ¶aan. u miunduaj ¶iniza. u amir~…æika bir~…æuwa î~ °-mar~…æi a kawaw-mimar~…æiaj, ajzasa sikawaw i nba indian r~…æiuma t…ôam. u takar~…æaw niza sa *** ¶m. u sur~…æit nu ƒßur~…æam kar~…æunasur~…æitan-sur~…æu
S.FORM: == nilacul == siwkay niza ci Aaron Brooks nalecuhan i 1 a bulad 14 a demiad 1985 a mihcaan. u miunduay ciniza. u Amilika biluwa'-mali a kawaw-mimaliay, ayzasa sikawaw i NBA Indian Liuma team. u takalaw niza sa 183cm. u sulit nu Hulam kalunasulitan-sulu
